title: Settings
scope: Central settings panel: discovers every installed app's config: schema at runtime, renders schema-driven inputs, and round-trips values through app_platform.config (scope app:<id>). Also exposes platform-scope settings, app panels, and the user's account. NOT per-app business logic — Settings is the configuration surface over the platform config service.

specs.title: List app settings
specs.behavior: Listing discovers every installed app's config schema and the apps that expose settings.

specs.title: Edit app settings
specs.behavior: Editing reads and writes an app's config values via schema-driven inputs (scope app:<id>).

specs.title: Platform settings
specs.behavior: Platform settings read and write the platform-scope configuration.

specs.title: Manage app panels
specs.behavior: Panel settings read and update the configuration of app panels.

specs.title: Manage your account
specs.behavior: Account settings read and update the signed-in user's own account details.
